message:
Limit vector search to 50K rows for demo efficiency

- Add MAX_SCAN_ROWS=50000 to avoid downloading entire dataset
- 50K rows × 512 dims × 4 bytes = ~100MB (reasonable for demo)
- Pass row limit through vectorSearchTopK to _vectorSearchBruteForce
- Early termination when limit reached
- Prevents 2GB+ downloads for 1M row datasets
